tasks.label: Docker: Rebuild + Restart Local Container, removing old container if one exists
args: docker build -t ectotrees:local .; $ancestorContainers = docker ps -aq --filter "ancestor=ectotrees:local"; if ($ancestorContainers) { docker rm -f $ancestorContainers | Out-Null }; $namedContainer = docker ps -aq --filter "name=^/ectotrees-local$"; if ($namedContainer) { docker rm -f $namedContainer | Out-Null }; docker run -d --name ectotrees-local -p 3001:3001 -e APP_URL=http://localhost:3001 -e DATA_DIR=/app/data -v ectotrees-local-data:/app/data ectotrees:local
